meta.title: Stackloom Pricing
meta.description: Choose the Stackloom plan that fits your workspace, access needs, and growth pace.

page.title: Choose a plan that matches your team
page.description: Start with the essentials, scale up when your workspaces expand, and keep admin, permissions, and collaboration in one place.

billing.annualNote: Yearly pricing is billed monthly at the discounted rate.

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: A lightweight plan for small teams that need clean workspace structure and permission basics.

f2.title: Core tenant, role, and menu management

f3.title: Audit logs for recent activity
f3.tooltip: Keep a rolling view of recent admin operations and sign-in activity.

advanced.name: Advanced
advanced.description: For growing organizations that need better governance, more members, and richer operational visibility.

f2.title: Reusable permission templates
f2.tooltip: Create permission presets once and reuse them across multiple workspaces.

f3.title: Longer audit retention
f3.tooltip: Keep admin, access, and operation logs available for up to 180 days.

f4.title: Priority issue handling and monitoring alerts

premium.name: Premium
premium.description: For larger teams that need deeper security, stronger automation, and white-glove rollout support.

f1.title: Unlimited workspaces with up to 200 members

f2.title: SSO and directory sync ready
f2.tooltip: Support centralized sign-in and directory-based user provisioning for larger organizations.

f3.title: Custom approval flow design
f3.tooltip: Model multi-step approval rules that match your operational process.
